LeaderboardEntry.title: Leaderboard Entry
LeaderboardEntry.description: A single entry in the global leaderboard representing a player's score.

score.description: The final score achieved by the player.

difficulty.description: The difficulty level of the game.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the score was achieved.

/leaderboard/{entryId}.description: Collection of all player scores for the global leaderboard.
